title: Swagger API documentation for specific podman version
body:
/kind documentation

**Description**

Is there any way to retrieve the API documentation for a given version of Podman? 
From what I understand, the [API swagger description](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html) is based on the master branch of the repo? Are the generated docs versioned somewhere (say, I'd like to retrieve them for Podman 2.0.4 specifically)?

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
As of right now, we don't have a way to get specific version of the API.
i can work with @cevich on this first thing next year.  the request is absolutely right.
I opened a Jira card to track this.
#9112 should fix this for 3.0! working through a few hiccups

@baude FWIW swagger upload script on master will [properly handle uploading a versioned yaml to cloud storage.](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/contrib/cirrus/runner.sh#L159).  With the new upload code ported to other branches, the only thing needing changing from one branch to the next[ is the file reference on the static page.](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/docs/source/_static/api.html#L21).  I did a bit of research, and it is possible to do that automatically with jinja templating...I'm just not sure how to test it on RTD.  How did you originally test the RTD setup w/o needing to tinker with files on podman master?
i think i made a bogus branch?
Ahh okay, well shucks, I don't think that trick would work again now that RTD is already in place.  Maybe I can do something with the *containers/automation_sandbox* repo.
